conditional: Newcastle will seek about £100million to consider selling the player.
headline: Tottenham Hotspur open talks with Newcastle for Sandro Tonali
body: Tottenham Hotspur have initiated discussions with Newcastle United regarding a potential transfer for Sandro Tonali.
text:
🚨 EXCL: Tottenham Hotspur open talks with Newcastle United over deal for Sandro Tonali. Man City pursuit ongoing - #MCFC & #THFC talking to 26yo’s reps in bid to agree personal terms. But contacting #NUFC shows Spurs intent to get deal done  nytimes.com/athletic/7366083…
Link
Tottenham open Sandro Tonali talks with Newcastle
Newcastle will seek about £100million ($133m) to consider selling the Italy international.
nytimes.com
draft_caption:
🔵 REPORTED: Sandro Tonali: Newcastle United → Tottenham Hotspur
Newcastle will seek about £100million to consider selling the player.
